title: Final plan evidence reconciliation after v0.5.38
outOfScope: Changing implementation, release workflow, or published release assets.
Deleting Work Item contracts, summaries, archive manifests, or release evidence.

sources.reason: Final plan-level evidence reconciliation after v0.5.38 publication.
Archive index updated by the lifecycle closure.
Merged release Work Item PR evidence.

riskAssessment.reason: Documentation-only reconciliation with independently verified merged PR, release workflow, tag, and asset evidence.

executionDecision.reason: The user authorized the serial lifecycle and the release has produced the evidence needed for final plan reconciliation.

preReviewWarnings: Verify every plan status claim against actual PR, merge, close, release Run, Tag, and asset evidence.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The plan records WI1 PR #237 merge/close evidence and its impact assessment.
The plan records the independent budget repair PR #238 and the release PR #239 lifecycle.
The plan records v0.5.38 Run 29922509671, published Tag target, and assets.
The plan marks the serial recalibration execution complete while retaining immutable evidence.
guidelines: Plan claims must be supported by repository or provider evidence.
Do not delete immutable Work Item or release evidence during cleanup.

intent.problem: The plan was initially closed before WI1; after WI1 execution and v0.5.38 publication, its final status and evidence index must be corrected.
constraints: Preserve v0.5.37 historical evidence and all archived Work Item records.
Use actual PR, merge, close, Run, Tag, and asset evidence.
intent.rationale: A final independent reconciliation makes the corrected order auditable and closes the plan without conflating historical and current release evidence.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Every listed Work Item has its actual lifecycle evidence or an explicit historical status.
The final release claim is bound to the published v0.5.38 tag, workflow, and assets.

rawUserRequest: After executing Work Item 1 and publishing the new version, align the complete plan with actual evidence and complete the final cleanup-plan Work Item.

declaredIntent.summary: Finalize the recalibration plan with actual lifecycle and release evidence.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized the serial plan, final plan cleanup, and publication workflow in the task conversation.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
